chunks.title: Message to Zedekiah
chunks.reason: Jeremiah delivers a unified oracle regarding the turning of weapons and the fate of the king.

chunks.title: Way of Life or Death
chunks.reason: A distinct prophetic declaration presenting two choices for the people with specific consequences.

chunks.title: Warning to the Royal House
chunks.reason: A direct address to the house of David calling for justice and warning of impending judgment.
